title: Carex sclerophylla
intro: Carex sclerophylla, also known as the rough-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Carex sclerophylla include various flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Carex sclerophylla is often used in traditional herbal medicine and is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to support overall health and well-being.
